events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the compliance determination directly to `/app/answer.json` using the provided NFPA 51B and OSHA Subpart J anchors.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la /app && [ -f /app/answer.json ] && sed -n '1,200p' /app/answer.json || true"
→ /app
